    qlnxe: Fix multiple locking issues

    Multiple issues are reported with WITNESS and code inspection of the
    locking and lock initialization.

    PR:             278084

    (cherry picked from commit 1c45a62a2f667b45ec10a92ad58ff5a34e68b569)
